categories.rule: No account may be opened for residents or companies incorporated there; no remittances to/from these countries; neither the applicant nor the beneficiary may be located in a sanctioned country.
No USD / EUR / GBP transactions to or from these countries (transactions in other currencies are permitted).

No dealings with sanctioned individuals/entities tied to repressive regimes or criminal organisations; no transactions in specified goods/services (arms, military equipment, munitions, diamonds, precious stones).
